description: This video explains how Binance protects your cryptocurrency through various security measures including cold storage, real-time monitoring, and an emergency fund known as SAFU. It emphasizes the importance of user responsibility in maintaining account security.
topic_summary: Binance employs multi-layered security strategies to safeguard user funds from scams and hacks, including cold storage [t=39:04], real-time monitoring [t=53:12], and an emergency fund with $1 billion in USDC [t=157:28].
